headline: Iran Declares Strait Of Hormuz Open To All Vessels: Crude Plunges 14%, Airlines And Cruise Stocks Soar
summary: Iran's Foreign Minister declared the Strait of Hormuz fully open to commercial shipping. Crude oil plunged nearly 14%. Airlines and cruise lines surged.

headline: Is Devon Energy (DVN) Pricing Reflect Long Term Value After Recent Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether Devon Energy's current share price really reflects its underlying worth, starting with a clear look at value can help you frame your next move. The stock recently closed at US$45.78, with returns of 20.9% year to date and 55.0% over the past year, alongside shorter term moves such as a 4.4% decline over 7 days and a 3.5% decline over 30 days that may have shifted sentiment. Recent coverage of Devon Energy has focused on how investors are reassessing oil and gas...
